title: Kernel handoff ABI audit
goal: Audit the kernel handoff and bootstrap ABI docs against the current x86_64 QEMU PC BSP implementation before the v1.8 platform line advances.
next_actions: Compare public headers and manifest exports with the handoff documentation.
Identify missing narrow consumer surfaces or stale claims.
Patch docs or implementation in the smallest coherent slice.
acceptance: Documented ABI surfaces match exported headers and manifest markers.
Any intentional gaps are captured as follow-up swarm tasks.
Focused BSP surface validation remains green.
